modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to extend equipment checkout reservation

full_description_text:  
I forgot the equipment at home and need to know if I can extend my reservation. I was trying to check out some hardware but now I’m not sure what to do. Can you help me with this?
short_description: Request to extend equipment checkout reservation
description: I forgot the equipment at home and need to know if I can extend my reservation. I was trying to check out some hardware but now I’m not sure what to do. Can you help me with this?
